description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND an SLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch
AND the playhead is behind the live point

steps.action:
WHEN the scrubber is displayed
AND the user selects the "Jump to Live" button
steps.result:
THEN playback moves to the live point
AND the playhead is all the way to the right on the scrubber
AND the entire scrubber bar is blue
AND a red Live indicator is displayed
AND the "Jump to Live" button does not display
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
